response.justification: Aisha brings extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks — aligning well with the role’s core stack and responsibilities, though limited explicit use of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java raises minor concerns about immediate productivity.
strengths: Deep full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven work on AI-agent systems and developer tooling
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in experience
Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java usage in recent roles
German language proficiency is only basic, may hinder local collaboration
